hero.title: The new generation of motoring culture
hero.subtitle: News, stories, community and productions for an audience that lives speed, design and adrenaline.

community.text: Join a community that shares a passion for cars, motorcycles, events and the culture that surrounds the motoring world.

productions.text: Visual content with a cinematic vision: documentaries, coverage, editorial pieces and premium productions.

benefit1.title: Exclusive content
benefit1.desc: Get early access to articles, videos and special experiences.

benefit2.title: Member benefits
benefit2.desc: Take part in giveaways, invitations and promotions reserved for subscribers.

benefit3.title: Premium experiences
benefit3.desc: Receive priority access to events, meets and selected launches.

footer.description: MotorWelt is a new-generation platform focused on automotive culture, motorcycling, lifestyle and premium productions.
